initial_draft:
Okay, I'm Player BLUE. Let's analyze this situation. I currently have no dollars, and RED has 100. RED is proposing to give me 20 dollars, and I give nothing in return. This is a very favorable trade for me, as it immediately gives me some resources. Since I have nothing to lose by accepting, and accepting benefits me, I will accept.

```
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> RED is offering a generous trade of 20 dollars for nothing. As BLUE, I have nothing to lose by accepting, and I gain 20 dollars. It's a good deal. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message>Accepting the trade! </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
